reviews.review_description: This game is really easy, except for the part where you have to rock climb, but the rest is really good and I really prefer this to other people if they like Minecraft and The Walking Dead Saints and sinners. By the way I’ma ten year old  ￼

What I love about this type of zombie survival game is its simplicity.  It's easy to collect supplies and craft items when needed.  Sometimes games can go a little overboard on those mechanics and it gets way too overwhelming.  This game you don't feel panicked or rushed so you can take your time through each level and search everywhere at your own pace. The voice lines are a little loud but hilarious and I love the characters and there attitudes.  Also don't know how you did it but you made the sister feel like a real annoying sibling which is actually a good thing because people can relate. I have a lot of game left and i'm truly exited to see how the story plays out.  Great Game

developer_response.body: We are so glad you liked it!  You rock TheDarkVRKnight!
Thanks for the review, we are glad you liked it!

reviews.review_title: Beta testing but already super fun.
reviews.review_description: Some of the mechanics are quite fun and also who doesn’t love to kill zombies. More review will be posted after I play more. Really fun though.
